title: Mode Switching - Propulsion Transition Certification
description: Certify the safe transition between propulsion modes across the full flight envelope. Covers ignition sequencing failure modes and abort capability during transition.
notes: Critical KNOT: propulsion mode transition is a key certification unknown for combined-cycle vehicles

title: TPS Reusability Certification
description: Establish and certify the inspection criteria, maintenance procedures, and re-flight authorisation process for the metallic/CMC TPS following each hypersonic re-entry.
notes: Critical KNOT: no established certification basis for reusable metallic/CMC TPS re-flight authorisation

title: Abort Coverage - Full-Envelope Safe Return
description: Demonstrate abort capability and safe return-to-landing across the full flight envelope from takeoff through orbit/apex and re-entry.
notes: Critical KNOT: full-envelope abort coverage required for airworthiness and launch licence

title: Dual Regulatory Framework - Airworthiness and Launch Licence
description: Establish the dual regulatory compliance framework addressing both civil airworthiness (EASA/FAA) and space launch licensing (AST/CAA-S) obligations for a runway-based SSTO vehicle.
notes: Critical KNOT: no precedent certification basis combining airworthiness and launch licence for a single vehicle

title: Cryo Reuse Cycle - LH2/LOX Turnaround and Fatigue
description: Certify the reuse cycle of the LH2/LOX cryogenic integral-structural tanks including thermal fatigue limits, inspection intervals, and allowable refuelling cycles.
notes: Critical KNOT: cryogenic fatigue in integral structural tanks is a key certification unknown for reusable SSTO
